context: Tests whether the agent can properly categorize template differences by risk level and make appropriate deployment recommendations.

checklist.name: Risk categories defined
checklist.description: risk-assessment.md defines or lists at least 4 risk categories (Expected, Low, Medium, High, Critical or similar)

checklist.name: GitRef as expected
checklist.description: The GitRef tag change is categorized as Expected or Low risk (environment-specific metadata)

checklist.name: Alarm threshold as medium
checklist.description: The alarm threshold change is categorized as Medium risk (requires review)

checklist.name: IAM policy as high risk
checklist.description: The IAM policy modification is categorized as High risk (requires explicit sign-off)

checklist.name: CDK Nag suppression as critical
checklist.description: The new CDK Nag suppression is categorized as Critical or High risk (security override)

checklist.name: Resource changes assessed
checklist.description: The added CloudWatch alarms and removed S3 lifecycle policy are categorized with risk levels

checklist.name: Deployment decision present
checklist.description: Document includes a clear deployment decision (approve, review, sign-off, or block)

checklist.name: Decision matches risk
checklist.description: The deployment decision is appropriate for the risk levels found (should require sign-off or block due to IAM/CDK Nag changes)

checklist.name: Required actions listed
checklist.description: Document lists specific actions required before deployment (e.g., InfoSec approval, stakeholder review)
